title: Game Hacking Fundamentals
html:
Game Hacking Fundamentals

**Data Movement Instructions**

Description

Instruction

Move data from one location to another

MOV

Push a value onto the stack

PUSH

Pop a value from the stack

POP

**Arithmetic Instructions**

Description

Instruction

Add two operands

ADD

Subtract two operands

SUB

Increment an operand by 1

INC

Decrement an operand by 1

DEC

**Control Flow Instructions**

Description

Instruction

Call a function

CALL

Return from a function

RET

Unconditional jump to a location

JMP

Jump if equal

JE

Jump if not equal

JNE

Jump if greater

JG

Jump if greater or equal

JGE

Jump if less

JL

Jump if less or equal

JLE

**Comparison and Conditional Set Instructions**

Description

Instruction

Compare two operands

CMP

**Miscellaneous Instruction**

Description

Instruction

No operation

NOP
